increment().details: Increments call depth in transient storage.

setLogIndex(uint256).details: Sets log index in transient storage.

params._msgHash: Hash of the message payload to call target with.

blockNumber().notice: Returns the block number of the Identifier. If not entered, reverts.

chainId().notice: Returns the chain ID of the Identifier. If not entered, reverts.

logIndex().notice: Returns the log index of the Identifier. If not entered, reverts.

origin().notice: Returns the origin address of the Identifier. If not entered, reverts.

setInteropStart().notice: Sets the Interop Start Timestamp for this chain. Can only be performed once and when the caller is the DEPOSITOR_ACCOUNT.

timestamp().notice: Returns the timestamp of the Identifier. If not entered, reverts.

InteropStartAlreadySet().notice: Thrown when attempting to set interop start when it's already set.

NotEntered().notice: Thrown when a non-written transient storage slot is attempted to be read from.

ReentrantCall().notice: Thrown when a reentrant call is detected.

@dev CrossL2Inbox contract instance.

@dev Tests that the setInteropStart function reverts when the caller is not the DEPOSITOR_ACCOUNT.
@dev Tests that the setInteropStart function reverts if called when already set
@dev Tests that the `origin` function returns the correct value.
@dev Tests that the `origin` function reverts when not entered.

@dev Tests that the `blockNumber` function reverts when not entered.
